title: Doggerly Board Server
body:
### DoggerlyBoard

DoggerlyBoard is a lightweight, fully server-side mod that allows administrators to create customizable and dynamic leaderboards — without requiring players to install the server module.

This project is split into two separate modules:

**🖥️ DoggerlyBoard (Server-Side)** – Handles leaderboard creation, stat tracking, and data management.

**🎨 DoggerlyBoard Client (Client-Side)** – Responsible for rendering and displaying the leaderboards visually in-game.

**🔗 Client-side module link:** https://modrinth.com/mod/doggerly-board-client

This separation ensures better performance, modularity, and flexibility for different server setups.

## ✨ Features

✅ Dedicated server-side logic module

📊 Fully customizable dynamic leaderboards

⚡ Real-time stat updates

🛠️ Easy administrator configuration

🎯 Perfect for PvP, UHC, survival, and competitive servers

🔄 Modular system (server + client separated)

## 🧩 How It Works

The server-side mod manages leaderboard data and tracks player statistics.

The client-side mod handles how the leaderboard is rendered and displayed to players.

This modular design allows server owners to control backend logic independently from the visual experience.

For a full setup guide and demonstration, check the video tutorial:

## 📺 Setup & Usage Guide:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/QHjTAT71aVM" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## 🎮 Ideal For

PvP kill rankings

Survival competitions

UHC tournaments

Economy servers

Event-based competitions

Custom stat tracking systems

## 🚀 Why DoggerlyBoard?

Unlike traditional leaderboard systems that rely on heavy plugins or monolithic designs, DoggerlyBoard uses a modular architecture — separating backend logic from frontend rendering — making it clean, scalable, and optimized for performance.
